mapper.select: SELECT cate_no AS cateNo, parent_no AS parentNo, cate_name AS cateName, depth, sort_order AS sortOrder, use_yn AS useYn FROM category WHERE depth = 1 AND use_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY sort_order ASC, cate_no ASC

SELECT cate_no AS cateNo, parent_no AS parentNo, cate_name AS cateName, depth, sort_order AS sortOrder, use_yn AS useYn FROM category WHERE depth = 2 AND use_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY parent_no ASC, sort_order ASC, cate_no ASC
SELECT cate_no AS cateNo, parent_no AS parentNo, cate_name AS cateName, depth, sort_order AS sortOrder, use_yn AS useYn FROM category WHERE cate_no = #{cateNo}
